title: Andrea Chenier
writer: Luigi Illica, Anna Gobbi, Mauro Curradi
actors: Antonella Lualdi, Raf Vallone, Michel Auclair
plot: Andrea Chenier, poet and politician, falls in love with an aristocratic girl also lusted after by the servant Gerard. The French Revolution breaks out and Chenier and Gerard are among the leaders, but Chenier is a moderate. It doe...
